'''notajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jth|jth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jth|jth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| notajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:notajithi|notajithi]] || [[word:notajiji|notajiji]] || [[word:notajishi|notajishi]] || [[word:notajiki|notajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:notajuthuthu|notajuthuthu]] || [[word:notajujuju|notajujuju]] || [[word:notajushushu|notajushushu]] || [[word:notajukuku|notajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:notajuthu|notajuthu]] || [[word:notajuju|notajuju]] || [[word:notajushu|notajushu]] || [[word:notajuku|notajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:notajufthuf|notajufthuf]] || [[word:notajufjuf|notajufjuf]] || [[word:notajufshuf|notajufshuf]] || [[word:notajufkuf|notajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:notajethe|notajethe]] || [[word:notajeje|notajeje]] || [[word:notajeshe|notajeshe]] || [[word:notajeke|notajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:notajothotho|notajothotho]] || [[word:notajojojo|notajojojo]] || [[word:notajoshosho|notajoshosho]] || [[word:notajokoko|notajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:notajotho|notajotho]] || [[word:notajojo|notajojo]] || [[word:notajosho|notajosho]] || [[word:notajoko|notajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:notajofthof|notajofthof]] || [[word:notajofjof|notajofjof]] || [[word:notajofshof|notajofshof]] || [[word:notajofkof|notajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:notajÃŸfthÃŸf|notajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfjÃŸf|notajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfshÃŸf|notajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfkÃŸf|notajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:notajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|notajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|notajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|notajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|notajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:notajÃŸfthÃŸf|notajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfjÃŸf|notajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfshÃŸf|notajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfkÃŸf|notajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:notajÃŸfthÃŸf|notajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfjÃŸf|notajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfshÃŸf|notajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:notajÃŸfkÃŸf|notajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:notajÃḊthÃḊ|notajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:notajÃḊjÃḊ|notajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:notajÃḊshÃḊ|notajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:notajÃḊkÃḊ|notajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:notajathatha|notajathatha]] || [[word:notajajaja|notajajaja]] || [[word:notajashasha|notajashasha]] || [[word:notajakaka|notajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:notajatha|notajatha]] || [[word:notajaja|notajaja]] || [[word:notajasha|notajasha]] || [[word:notajaka|notajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:notajafthaf|notajafthaf]] || [[word:notajafjaf|notajafjaf]] || [[word:notajafshaf|notajafshaf]] || [[word:notajafkaf|notajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:notajasha|notajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:notajshÃḋsha|notajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notajrosha|notajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notajmusha|notajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:notajyasha|notajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotajnkshÃḋsha|gonotajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotajnkrosha|gonotajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotajnkmusha|gonotajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotajnkyasha|gonotajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:notatajasha|notatajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notatajshÃḋsha|notatajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notatajrosha|notatajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notatajmusha|notatajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notatajyasha|notatajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotatajnkshÃḋsha|gonotatajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotatajnkrosha|gonotatajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotatajnkmusha|gonotatajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotatajnkyasha|gonotatajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:netÃḊjasha|netÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:netÃḊjshÃḋsha|netÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:netÃḊjrosha|netÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:netÃḊjmusha|netÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:netÃḊjyasha|netÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonetÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gonetÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonetÃḊjnkrosha|gonetÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonetÃḊjnkmusha|gonetÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonetÃḊjnkyasha|gonetÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:notfajasha|notfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notfajshÃḋsha|notfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notfajrosha|notfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notfajmusha|notfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notfajyasha|notfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotfajnkshÃḋsha|gonotfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotfajnkrosha|gonotfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotfajnkmusha|gonotfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotfajnkyasha|gonotfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
